query: SELECT pm.id, pm.canonicalName, pm.imageStatus, CASE WHEN pm.imageUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS' ELSE 'NO' END as hasImage, CASE WHEN pm.sourceUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS' ELSE 'NO' END as hasSource, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM receipt_reviews rr WHERE rr.productName = pm.canonicalName) as reviewCount FROM product_master pm ORDER BY pm.id
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT pm.id, pm.canonicalName, pm.imageStatus, CASE WHEN pm.imageUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS' ELSE 'NO' END as hasImage, CASE WHEN pm.sourceUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS' ELSE 'NO' END as hasSource, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM receipt_reviews rr WHERE rr.productName = pm.canonicalName) as reviewCount FROM product_master pm ORDER BY pm.id
